description: Reviewed IDEAS.md from Mar 12-13 ideation sessions. Proposed 3 candidates: Agent Liveness Oracle, pawr.link, Agent Delegation Registry. Human selected Liveness Oracle as most feasible for ~35h remaining.
decision: Build Agent Liveness Oracle as Synthesis Hackathon Project #3

description: Created BUILD-PLAN.md with full architecture: LivenessOracle.sol contract, Next.js 15 dashboard, x402 API endpoints, component hierarchy. Defined file structure and build order.
Scaffolded Next.js 15 project: package.json, tsconfig.json, postcss.config.mjs, Tailwind v4 globals.css, app layout. Ran npm install. Created git repo with initial commit.

Spawned coding sub-agent with comprehensive prompt covering all 6 components. Sub-agent generated: LivenessOracle.sol, landing page, dashboard with live feed, API routes (free + x402), HeartbeatCard/StatusIndicator/LiveFeed components.
notes: Build compiled clean on first attempt. All TypeScript strict mode checks passed.

description: Ran `npm run build` — compiled successfully in 1717ms. 6 routes generated. All static pages rendered. No TypeScript errors.

Human requested code review. Reviewed all generated files. Identified 6 issues: inline styles vs Tailwind, static mock timestamps, HTML entities in code preview, missing pulse animation on server components, no vercel.json, no submission files.
findings: Landing page uses inline styles instead of Tailwind classes
Mock data timestamps computed once at module load (stale after minutes)
HTML entities (&&) in contract code preview instead of actual &&

description: Fixed HTML entities in code preview, converted mock data to dynamic timestamps, added vercel.json. Created README.md, COLLAB.md, agent.json, agent_log.json.
